objectives.text: Ask Sister Thecla why the north road is closed.
Search the dead fields for Tobias’s missing team.
Report the field attack to Sister Thecla.
Continue north toward the Quarantine Farms.

stages.description: A road nun has stopped northbound traffic beside a cartwright with a torn shoulder.
Tobias Faber left two people and a cart in the east field. Nothing came back.
Five recent Stage IV forms rose from the furrows. Sister Thecla needs the count before she opens the road.
Sister Thecla has the field count. Travelers can move toward the Quarantine Farms again.
